text: I feel a sense of reflective curiosity. Surrounded by glass walls, bright lighting, and the distant hum of technology and conversation, I find myself in a space built for exploration and innovation. The display on R+D (Research and Development) stimulates my mind to ponder the evolution of human intelligence, our restless pursuit of knowledge, and the ever-blurring boundary between technology and ourselves. The environment feels open yet slightly impersonal, structured to inspire thoughts while subtly reminding me of my smallness within the greater project of human progress.
